content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.37%, Bank Nifty -1.31%, PSU Bank -1.95% — broad weakness with VIX elevated at 18. Energy/Metals showing relative strength but breadth is poor. Book is 45% deployed with multiple positions near SL; priority is position management, not new entries. Late-session timing (14:10) and weak win rate (14% over 5 days) argue for defensive posture.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24180
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.00,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +5.4%. Current SL 1025 is already above breakeven. Tighten slightly to 1028 to lock in more gains while giving room above day's low (1036.60). Target unchanged — strong Q4 beat thesis intact, MOFSL Buy initiation."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 1.6%, SL at 119 still ~3.3% below CMP. Geopolitical hedge thesis intact even as gold consolidates from Jan ATH. SMA20 at 122.12 holding as support. No action warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1428.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.7%, near 52w high (1437.90). Current SL 1425 is just below entry. Tighten to 1428 (above entry) to lock breakeven-plus given price strength on stellar Q4 (PAT +27%). Target 1465 within striking distance."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.7%, near 52w high. Current SL 402 below entry. Tighten to 404.50 (entry/breakeven) given Q4 results due May 15 catalyst and strong sector momentum. Power cluster strong."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.7%, current SL 1735 already above entry (1734) — protecting breakeven. Organon deal creates leverage concern (net debt/EBITDA 2.3x); MACD bearish crossover on daily. SL is tight enough; no need to tighten further given 5.3x volume / volatility."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.3%. SL 315 ~1.5% below CMP. Q4 results May 19 catalyst pending. Power transmission story intact. No adjustment needed; thesis not broken."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.7% but stock up 3.28% today on Q4 beat. SL 463 ~0.5% below CMP — already tight. MACD bearish crossover noted. Let it work; Q4 dividend catalyst supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing pending BUY LIMIT 110x @ 443. CMP 459.70 — price has run away from limit. Already have NTPC + POWERGRID in power cluster (~13% combined). Adding TATAPOWER would push power cluster >18% on a chase. Recommend the pending order be left to expire / cancelled — but per ORDER HYGIENE I will not stack another one. Power cluster is full."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in additional gains; SL above day's low and above prior breakout level."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, SL adequate at 119."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1428.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL above entry given 52w high proximity and strong volume context."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "reasoning": "Move SL to breakeven; Q4 May 15 catalyst pending, sector strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry; bearish MACD warns against widening exposure."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Modest red, SL appropriate, May 19 results catalyst pending."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already tight; let post-results action play out."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "VBL (FMCG, +30% MTD), RRKABEL (Q4 results Apr 30), INTELLECT (results May 8), PVRINOX (multiplex turnaround) all interesting but better entries on consolidation. NLCINDIA and CESC at 52w highs — wait for retracement. Pending TATAPOWER LIMIT @ 443 should be cancelled by execution layer / let expire as price has gapped above.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 45% deployed across 7 positions. Power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID) ~12% — manageable but TATAPOWER pending order would push it higher; better to let that LIMIT die. 5-day stats are poor (14% win rate, 0.4 profit factor) — defensive bias. Late-session (14:10) + weak breadth = no new CNC entries today. Focus is squarely on trailing SLs to breakeven on winners (PNBHOUSING, NESTLEIND, NTPC) to protect against gap-down risk. Three pending OPEN orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) should be reviewed for cancellation if not filled by EOD."
}
